Generated the agentic-recipe mermaid diagrams, split into 5 parts, from the planner's own recipe table — a visual overview of how Formal AI drives its own tools. Generated document (agentic-recipes.md): # Formal AI agentic recipes (generated) A high-level, split-into-parts visual overview of how Formal AI drives its own agentic CLI to complete a task. Part 1 shows how a request is routed to a recipe; each later part details what happens for input handled by that recipe — the deterministic `search -> fetch -> write -> verify -> final` state machine in `src/agentic_coding/`. Scope: these diagrams cover the issue #468/#538 recipe slice. The planner also routes self-heal, dreaming-audit, source-graph, ledger, explain, change-request, repair-strategy, rebuild, Google-Trends learning/catalog, question-catalog, and the general capability router — the `otherwise` edge in Part 1 stands for all of them. ## Part 1 — Overview: how a task is routed ```mermaid flowchart TD user["user task"] --> router{"plan_chat_step
routes by keywords"} router -->|"formaliz / knowledge base / fisherman"| formalize["Formalize a text into a knowledge base (#468)"] router -->|"more detailed / grammatical number / a known concept"| meaning["Make a meaning more detailed (#538)"] router -->|"mermaid / diagram / visual overview"| diagram["Generate these diagrams (#538)"] router -->|"cst/ast / abstract-syntax / reason about itself"| self_ast["Store the CST/AST of the meta algorithm (#538)"] router -->|"otherwise"| solver["ordinary solver text"] ``` ## Part 2 — Recipe: Formalize a text into a knowledge base (#468) ```mermaid flowchart LR formalize_task["user task
(formaliz / knowledge base / fisherman)"] formalize_task --> formalize_0["1. web_search
find the source text"] formalize_0 --> formalize_1["2. web_fetch
read it; a tool error falls back to the canonical synopsis"] formalize_1 --> formalize_2["3. write_file
formalize prose into Links Notation"] formalize_2 --> formalize_3["4. run_command
cat the file to verify the write landed"] formalize_3 --> formalize_final(["final answer
the artifact inline"]) ``` ## Part 3 — Recipe: Make a meaning more detailed (#538) ```mermaid flowchart LR meaning_task["user task
(more detailed / grammatical number / a known concept)"] meaning_task --> meaning_0["1. web_search
find the concept's Wikidata lexemes"] meaning_0 --> meaning_1["2. web_fetch
read the forms; recover the missing plural"] meaning_1 --> meaning_2["3. write_file
re-derive the grounded block, byte-for-byte the seed"] meaning_2 --> meaning_3["4. run_command
cat the block to verify"] meaning_3 --> meaning_final(["final answer
the artifact inline"]) ``` ## Part 4 — Recipe: Generate these diagrams (#538) ```mermaid flowchart LR diagram_task["user task
(mermaid / diagram / visual overview)"] diagram_task --> diagram_0["1. write_file
render the mermaid parts from the recipe table"] diagram_0 --> diagram_1["2. run_command
cat the document to verify"] diagram_1 --> diagram_final(["final answer
the artifact inline"]) ``` ## Part 5 — Recipe: Store the CST/AST of the meta algorithm (#538) ```mermaid flowchart LR self_ast_task["user task
(cst/ast / abstract-syntax / reason about itself)"] self_ast_task --> self_ast_0["1. write_file
parse the planner via meta-language; write the AST node census"] self_ast_0 --> self_ast_1["2. run_command
cat the census to verify"] self_ast_1 --> self_ast_final(["final answer
the artifact inline"]) ```
